hypothesis: E8 mechanism probe: E4 family-span context can preserve S1 family recall while reducing false-family context exposure or prompt substrate size relative to the matched full-note cap-25 baseline.
metric_caveats: Kanban E8 preregistered cap-slice mechanism probe; not a published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Varied factor is context selection only: E4 exect.sections.family_spans.v1 context for diagnosis_problem, seizure, medication, and investigation-bearing lines.
S1 benchmark-facing families only: diagnosis, seizure_type, and annotated_medication; investigation spans are reported as context diagnostics, not scored labels.
Compare only with configs/experiments/exect_s1_full_note_e8_cap25_gpt4_1_mini.json under the same split, cap, model, prompt, scorer, and repair policy.
Promotion requires recall preservation plus a real precision, evidence, or cost benefit; this cap slice cannot by itself promote family-span prompting.
